overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character moves from a covered commercial walkway through an intersection and past the Dewdrop Inn, with wet streets reflecting vibrant neon signage and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon storefronts

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway toward the open street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing by digital storefront displays and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black outfit walking toward camera while drinking from a cup

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent strip lighting running along the corridor
horizontal red neon tube light mounted on the right wall
large illuminated window with digital advertisements and neon signage
structural support column for the overhead walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial walkway lined with neon-lit storefronts and digital displays. The concrete ceiling stretches overhead with embedded lighting, while pedestrians pass by in the scattered crowd. The corridor leads toward an exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with traffic signals

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street intersection with wet asphalt
stops at red traffic light waiting for vehicles to pass
begins crossing the street as traffic clears and light changes

agents.ego_description: stops at the crosswalk to wait for passing cars, then proceeds to cross the wet asphalt street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements high on building facade
wet black asphalt road surface reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wet urban intersection at night. The character waits at a red traffic light as a black sedan passes by, then crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk. Large digital billboards tower overhead while the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with towering digital billboards

events.description: blue sedan drives past in the foreground while walking along the curb
approaching the Dewdrop Inn building with prominent neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the street curb, passing under large digital billboards and approaching the Dewdrop Inn

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving down the street past the camera

entered.detail: tall building wrapped with massive curved digital advertising screens showing colorful graphics
corner building with art deco styling and prominent neon signage
bright pink neon sign reading WIDE OPEN on building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open commercial street, the character passes beneath massive curved digital billboards that illuminate the wet pavement. A blue sedan drives past as the character approaches the Dewdrop Inn, identified by its distinctive neon signage and retro facade. The street remains relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with Dewdrop Inn and underpass entrance

events.description: entering the shadow of the overhead highway structure
approaching the illuminated underpass entrance with purple neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking past the Dewdrop Inn entrance and bright street lamp, heading toward the underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall street light with bright white illumination
concrete highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect ahead
purple neon strip lighting inside the underpass entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Dewdrop Inn's glowing facade and a bright street lamp, moving toward an underpass ahead. The environment becomes more enclosed as the overhead highway structure blocks the sky, casting the street in shadow. Purple neon lights illuminate the underpass entrance in the distance while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with neon lighting

events.description: enters the covered underpass with purple neon ceiling lighting
turns slightly to follow the narrow walkway beside the building

agents.ego_description: entering the underpass area and walking along the narrow covered walkway beside the Dewdrop Inn

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the highway underpass with embedded lighting
large glass windows of the Dewdrop Inn showing interior warm lighting
horizontal purple neon tubes illuminating the underpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered underpass, where purple neon strips illuminate the concrete ceiling overhead. Walking along the narrow sidewalk beside the Dewdrop Inn's large windows, the environment becomes more enclosed and intimate. The wet concrete reflects the purple neon glow as the pathway continues deeper into the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, covered commercial corridor into a sprawling neon-lit intersection before descending into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins within a walkway lined with digital displays and embedded ceiling lights, moving steadily toward a distant exit. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a wide, wet intersection where the camera captures the reflection of towering billboards on the asphalt while crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. The path then continues along an open street past massive curved screens and the retro neon facade of the Dewdrop Inn, before the sky is gradually blocked by the heavy concrete of an overhead highway. Finally, the environment becomes enclosed and intimate as the camera enters a covered underpass, where the lighting shifts to a deep purple glow reflecting off the wet concrete walls.
